approaches.title: Hash map character frequency counting
approaches.summary: Counts magazine characters in a hash map, then consumes those counts while scanning the ransom note.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial solution using a HashMap to track available character frequencies.

approaches.title: Fixed-size alphabet frequency array
approaches.summary: Uses a 26-element array indexed by the offset of each lowercase letter from 'a' to track available characters.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces the hash map with a fixed-size array indexed by lowercase-letter offsets.
